title: Jupyter Notebook Collaboration History
description: History retention and versioning settings for collaborative editing. Controls snapshot creation, retention policies, and diff visualization modes for tracking changes across collaborative notebook sessions.

maxHistorySnapshots.title: Maximum History Snapshots
maxHistorySnapshots.description: Maximum number of history snapshots to retain per notebook. Older snapshots will be automatically deleted when this limit is reached.

historyRetentionDays.title: History Retention Days
historyRetentionDays.description: Number of days to keep history snapshots before automatic deletion. This setting helps manage storage usage by cleaning up old version history.

enableAutoSnapshot.title: Enable Automatic Snapshots
enableAutoSnapshot.description: Automatically create snapshots during collaborative editing sessions. When enabled, significant changes will trigger snapshot creation for version tracking.

snapshotOnSave.title: Snapshot on Save
snapshotOnSave.description: Create a history snapshot every time the notebook is saved. This ensures version tracking at key persistence points.

diffVisualizationMode.title: Diff Visualization Mode
diffVisualizationMode.description: How to display differences when comparing versions in the history viewer. Affects the visual layout and presentation of changes.
